availability.p: This information may not be reproduced without the explicit permission from the copyright holder. For copyright information, please contact Deryle Lonsdale at lonz@byu.edu

notesStmt.note: There are two versions of the Gloria Patri in Romanized Lushootseed.

app.rdg: THE GLORY BE TO THE FATHER.
THE GLORY BE TO THE FATHER.
Gloria Patri: Glory be to the Father
Alh kwe gwas≈çyutems lilzirh rharha k Sherk Siam Ban, eta Beda, eta St-espli.
V. Halh kwi gwa soyutobs lilhzihu rara ku Sherk-Siam Ban, eta Bedas, eta Sent-Ospli.

R. Rolab aku di te lilhzihu 'tlalba asista alti i kwi tlhba tskwakred. ( 3 times. )
